programme.title: Florida By Day
programme.desc: We spend the daylight hours with the CVA marketing team hunting gators with 5L Outfitters and Brad and Adam break away with Captain Jeff Vickers to catch over 100 fish in just a few hours before their plane leaves!

programme.title: Florida By Night
programme.desc: We finish up our awesome trip in Tampa Bay with Twisted Limbs Bowfishing and our ministry banquet winner Jim and his kids get after stingrays. They also try to fill two gator tags the following night with 5L Outfitters.

programme.title: The Legend of Marino Ends
programme.desc: Jared has his best hunt ever on the River Farm, and Mike takes down the legend Marino

programme.title: Giant 8 Point
programme.desc: Rye Ludwig takes his first Iowa buck, a giant bodied 8-pointer. Max Mongrello finally tags a great deer on the last day of season.

programme.title: Tennessee Stud
programme.desc: Jared has yet another encounter with Diablo where only a few seconds separates a shot. Forrest Binkley takes a stud in Tennessee, and Jared and Max team up to harvest a few does.

programme.title: Ruvio Cordless Vacuum
programme.desc: Ruvio Cordless Vacuum 4pay $33 CanadaISCI: 558117CCH (800) 251-1275

programme.title: Offroad RVing / The Ultimate Fifth Wheel
programme.desc: We take you out for some extreme RVing starting with an offroad adventure that tests the toughest RV we’ve ever seen. Then we look at a fifth-wheel trailer like no other.

programme.title: Is a Park Model an RV? / Renting
programme.desc: an a mobile home that’s anything but mobile actually be considered an RV? Then, is your RV in the shop? Considering a different kind of RV? RV curious and don’t own one? The answer… RV rentals!

programme.title: RVing to Mexico
programme.desc: Some RVers avoid Mexico due to concerns about safety or complicated border procedures, but touring in a group makes the beauty and adventure of Mexico possible with ease.

programme.title: Mozambique Crocodile Safari
programme.desc: Buck & Max are on safari in Mozambique. The crew is after a huge 12 foot man eating crocodile in the Zambezi River. A look at the local native culture is also featured.

programme.title: The Firing Line
programme.desc: Three stories are featured. Buck shoots with a couple women, the history of the AR-15 rifle is showcased and a WW2 vet shares his weapons of war.

programme.title: Nicaragua Duck Hunt
programme.desc: Buck & Max visit Nicaragua to explore the country, visit the capital Managua and experience some exciting duck hunting on Lake Managua

programme.title: The Best Encounters of 2023
programme.desc: This week we take a look back at some of the best encounters of 2023. From predators to turkeys and Cape buffalo to screaming bulls, we cover the gamut of big game the world over

programme.title: Sharing Land Conservation
programme.desc: Rich talks about sharing the conservation of the land on the trapline and then a very cool otter and lynx check.

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Last season in Part 1, Rochelle Partridge passed up a monster framed 8, rolling the dice in hopes that the buck could survive another year. This episode shows just what a year can do.

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 3
programme.desc: The conclusion to Rochelle's unbelievable years long hunt, and the massive reward that can come when rolling the dice.

programme.title: The Maybe Buck
programme.desc: Taylor Partridge's Excalibur crossbow hunt for a MONSTER typical whitetail. A summer's work leads to a decision on whether or not to hunt a deer that turns out to be one of the largest in Canadian Whitetail history.

programme.title: These Colours Run Deep
programme.desc: This week Marc and Bill head out to meet up with some of the guys to go after some geese.

programme.title: Fun
programme.desc: This week Marc, Amber and Lorne are out hitting some trails looking for grouse.

programme.title: Property Diversity
programme.desc: If you want a property with a little added value, seek to find the ones with a strong diversity of hunting opportunities.

programme.title: Property Financing
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann talks about the financial considerations you should be taking before you make the jump at buying your dream hunting property.

programme.title: Measure in Memories
programme.desc: Editor-in-Chief Dan Schmidt returns to his roots of shooting, what makes him happy, and explains why you should have no apologies for doing the exact same thing.

programme.title: Bed Bucks
programme.desc: The DDH team shares best practices for identifying and hunting whitetail bedding areas.

programme.title: A Time to Talk
programme.desc: Tension runs high as Dan Schmidt moderates a discussion of all things whitetail hunting between esteemed whitetail expert Dr. Stephen Ditchkoff of the Auburn University Deer Lab and famous rock star and hunting activist, Ted Nugent.

programme.title: Jason's Place
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann walks us through his own dream deer hunting property and shows us how easy it is to set up a brand new Orion hunting blind.

programme.title: Modern Heroes - Part 1
programme.desc: Treestand accidents unfortunately happen every year despite efforts of public awareness. On this episode of Modern Hunter we showcase a mock hunting accident and the modern heroes that are standing by to answer the call.

programme.title: Modern Heroes - Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of our Modern Heroes special, features the Rhinelander, Wisconsin volunteer fire department as they answer a call to save a fallen hunter.

programme.title: Off Season
programme.desc: With a last minute invite from his good friend Brad Rucks, Mark Scroggins get his opportunity in the off season at his very first trophy axis buck.

programme.title: Tennessee
programme.desc: Join Host Alexa Score as she visits some of the best off-road parks in Tennessee.

programme.title: Rugged Radios
programme.desc: Join Host Alexa Score and the team from Rugged Radios as they transform a Polaris General into a roving taco truck.

programme.title: Early Season Waterfowl in Saskatchewan
programme.desc: Chris Dorsey returns to the top of the flyway for his own annual migration as he hunts early season waterfowl in Saskatchewan with good friend Steve Hicks.

programme.title: The Ibex Slam
programme.desc: Chris Dorsey looks to complete the Ibex slam by taking the Ronda and Beceite subspecies in the mountains of southern Spain.

programme.title: Fourteen
programme.desc: After a horrible hunt in the Hill Country, Blaine spends his last day in South Texas looking for a unicorn 14-point buck.

programme.title: Best of North American Big Game Hunting
programme.desc: Kristy Titus takes you behind the scenes on a more personal level, showcasing some of her favorite North American big game hunts for moose, mountain goat, Dall sheep and mountain caribou.

programme.title: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Join Kristy Titus for this episode of Pursue the Wild where she hunts whitetail in Missouri and Kansas.

programme.title: Cash Out Season - Oregon Steens Mule Deer
programme.desc: Kristy Titus prepares for her second mule deer hunt in the coveted Steens Mountain unit in Oregon. Join her as she cashes out her preference points and completes her final hunt as an Oregon resident.

programme.title: Pike & Smallmouth Bass
programme.desc: Casting lures for weed & structure pike and smallmouth bass.

programme.title: Trolling Walleye & Lake Trout
programme.desc: Great Lakes open-water walleye and lake trout.

programme.title: Season's Highlights
programme.desc: Jigging lake trout, walleye, top-water smallmouth bass, cranking walleye and coastal river salmon.

programme.title: A Look Back
programme.desc: The guys look back on an unbelievable year of fishing. From offshore giants to bays, this was one action packed season.

programme.title: Going Deep in the Skinny
programme.desc: The captains take a deep look at flats fishing in Panama City, Florida.

programme.title: Florida, Meet Texas
programme.desc: Capt. Todd & Capt. Jamie take the Towee Boat on a cast & blast dream trip.

programme.title: Colorado Dream Hunt
programme.desc: A culmination of volunteers and donors come together to give our recipient the absolute hunt of a lifetime! First, we join Dustin on an intense spot n stalk hunt for an elk followed by a good old-fashioned prairie dog shoot.

programme.title: Hunting for a Giant
programme.desc: Our first hunt takes us along with our recipient Jacob whose dream of taking down a giant bull moose is about to become a reality. Then we join Brody, who is new to hunting but has the big dream of taking a big ol' trophy whitetail buck!

programme.title: One Shot Moose Kill
programme.desc: We start off with Keegan whose dream is to take a crack at one the largest animals in North America, then O.A.F. star Gabe is back for his first turkey hunt, lastly returning hunter Jamison is on a spot & stalk North Dakota elk hunt of epic portions.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 12
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 1
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 2
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: Jumbo Perch
programme.desc: Mitchell and Roger target jumbo perch through the ice, camping out over night doing a catch and cook!

programme.title: Dreams Become Reality
programme.desc: The Moment of Truth TV crew experienced some serious heart break throughout the fall, but persevered and were rewarded with a unforgettable season having their best season yet.

programme.title: Back to Back Bruins
programme.desc: Mitchell targets a beautiful black bear in the boreal forests of Alberta.

programme.title: Up to Us
programme.desc: Follow along as David takes us through an Iowa archery season, explaining why hunters do what they do.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Watch as the Holder's release the humorous side of Raised Hunting. If you can't laugh at yourself, who can you laugh at? Someone else...

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: Join the Holder family as they take a look at an entire hunting season and how hunting mimics life.

programme.title: Feed the Whale
programme.desc: For the maiden voyage of the new Kingfisher Boats 3025 GFX Brendan wanted to bring on a very special guest. An expert of the ocean and everyone’s favourite 6 ton mammal, Fin the whale, official mascot of the Vancouver Canucks.

programme.title: Walters Cove Resort
programme.desc: Brendan Morrison and Dave Babych head to Kyuquot for an unforgettable trip to Walters Cove Resort, owned by the Kyuquot/Checleseht First Nations.

programme.title: Marlin for Marty
programme.desc: Legendary NHL Goaltender Marty Turco joins Brendan and Steve Rae in Cabo San Lucas for an epic day on the water.

programme.title: Mesquite
programme.desc: Texas is known for being target rich, and the boys have proven that. They shot so many bucks in October it barely fits into an episode!

programme.title: Spot & Stalk
programme.desc: It’s bear season in Alaska, and Mike has been waiting four years to get this permit. He’s got an itch to take down a big bear, and the Savage is sighted in.

programme.title: Axis Heat
programme.desc: It’s hot in Texas, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get in a good axis hunt. It doesn’t get better than walking, stalking and dropping an axis deer.

programme.title: Kettle Falls Walleye
programme.desc: Bob Loomis and Britton Ransford join Rich Harrod on a walleye fishing adventure to the upper reach of Lake Roosevelt. The fish are numerous and the bite is on in this beautiful part of the Columbia River

programme.title: Passing on a Hunting Traditon
programme.desc: The Martin fathers are teaching their daughters and sons to hunt elk in the juniper country of eastern Oregon. Horses helped the family get to the high ground where elusive bulls could be found, but the ride doesn’t guarantee success

programme.title: Gobble Gobble
programme.desc: This week on Hit Squad Outdoors, it's all about the turkeys

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Join five time UFC Champ, Tim Sylvia, in the outdoors hunting and fishing

programme.title: Dangerous Gator
programme.desc: Blaine is in a small dingy and things get a little crazy when a gator tries to get him inside the small boat

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: Producer Eric Orton travels remote logging roads to witness extreme hatchery operations with Steve Lacasse, Debbie Anderson, and husband Grant Anderson on Northern Vancouver Island

programme.title: The Icebox
programme.desc: Northern Manitoba holds some of the biggest lake trout on the planet. Guides from Bakers Narrows Lodge explain the benefits of catch and release while battling extreme weather warnings on their way to becoming Master Anglers

programme.title: The Gateway
programme.desc: The Gateway is fed by ancient glacier rivers with an abundance of sockeye salmon and the predators that feed on them. Eric Orton talks about his time off-shore fishing Port Hardy

programme.title: It’s Like Candy for Pike
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. When the bite slows, how do you entice the giants? Check out this finesse presentation that always works time and time again on the inactive brutes

programme.title: A Trick or Two for Bass
programme.desc: Today’s destination takes Charlie up to the Land O’ Lakes area of Eastern Ontario for smallmouth bass. Charlie joins up with friend Chris McMillan as the two enjoy a day of bass fishing. The two share techniques for clear water lakes

programme.title: Hooked on Lake Trout and Untouched Walleye
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. Check out Charlie’s tip on modifying your tackle for large lake trout. Then, off for an often ignored walleye bite that will have you wanting more

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 1
programme.desc: Watch this week as Ted, Amber and country music singer Heath Sanders go to hunt mule deer in Texas

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 2
programme.desc: Ted and country music singer, Heath Sanders chase mule deer and then it’s off to do some airgun hunting on some Texas deer!

programme.title: Revelstoke ATV Adventure
programme.desc: The boys take to the trails in Revelstoke, BC with members of the Revelstoke ATV Club

programme.title: White Lake BC Trout
programme.desc: Back to BC, on the beautiful waters of White Lake looking for trophy rainbows

programme.title: Kokanee Springs Escape
programme.desc: Jason tees off as Blair runs the cart and the boys explore Crawford Bay, BC and Kokanee Springs Resort

programme.title: YouTube Hog Hunt Special
programme.desc: Today we're doing something a little different, we're giving you a little history on our YouTube channel and showing some of our favorite posts. Then, we’ll show three of our best hog hunts that have never aired anywhere but YouTube

programme.title: Swamp Hogs & Mickey Gilley Dedication
programme.desc: We join Keith on a thermal hog hunt, later he introduces us to his friend Shannon Tracy from UVC Powersports as both Shannon and Keith talk about the life and career of country music legend, Mickey Gilley

programme.title: Thermal Rampage
programme.desc: Keith Warren and his daughter meet up with Team Swamp Stomp for a Texas hog hunt in the dead of night using some killer Pulsar thermal scopes! Joining them is Garrett Streitz of APF, who decks out the team with some top-notch .308 Caliber AR-10s for the carnage!

programme.title: Dacre Part II & Mud Fest
programme.desc: Find out how the team finished at the Dacre and then they head to Mirimachi Mud Fest 2023

programme.title: Nackawic & Crabbe Mountain Inn
programme.desc: The town of Nackawic is an exceptional ATV Hero as they allow the crossing of the St. John River to connect the southern and northern parts of New Brunswick. Many towns could learn from the welcoming nature of this town. We then head to an ATV friendly Inn to further explore the area

programme.title: Adventure Day
programme.desc: The Trekkit Crew takes a bunch of first time ATV riders out on brand new Segway ATVs and SxS and have them experience riding the trails. The trip ranges from getting stuck in the mud, rock climbs, and scenic trails

programme.title: Fur Buying Event
programme.desc: Join Kent Maitland and fellow trappers as he inspects, grades and purchases, shed antlers and prime pelts

programme.title: Punching Trails
programme.desc: Join Scott and some good friends as they help punch trails in deep snow

programme.title: Cold November Set Up
programme.desc: Scott heads down to Valley Firearms to buy a compact dispatch rifle for the snowmobile. Then he hangs a lynx set and sets up the line on a cold November start to the season

programme.title: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH registered heroes Clint Kelly and Terrance Flemons to Rock Water Ranch in Texas to do population control on hog

programme.title: African Adventure
programme.desc: The Ultimate OATH joins veteran Tim Crawford in South Africa with Cheetah Safaris for a bucket list safari hunt

programme.title: Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: Hosts Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH heroes Master Sergeant Gilberto Tony Roman and Marine veteran Dave Kochmanski to Canada to hunt black bears with Harvest Lodge Outfitters for the inaugural Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt.

programme.title: Two Great Hog Hunts
programme.desc: fter participating in the Carolina Coyote Classic, John MacPherson is joined by Sean Casey of DNA Firearm systems to go hog hunting. Later he is joined by Adam Simpson for another incredible hog hunt!

programme.title: Hog & Coyote Hunting
programme.desc: John and Sean Casey help out a farmer who is having a problem with wild hogs, then it's coyote time!

programme.title: Monster Whitetails of Ohio
programme.desc: John & Beth head to Ohio with the owners of Black Widow Deer Lures, Andy & Janice. Janice harvests her first monster buck and Beth opts for a doe to collect some venison to punch her tag.

programme.title: Archery Buck
programme.desc: We join Dane as he harvests his biggest buck with a bow, and what makes this even more special is that his father JD is behind the camera

programme.title: North Carolina Buck
programme.desc: his week we join John \"JBone\" Rowland. You won't believe the buck that he harvests right outside of Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: The Reason for Monster Whitetails
programme.desc: This week we're hunting with our good friends from The Reason as they head out to try and get some monster whitetails.

programme.title: Carolina Dreamin'
programme.desc: This week, Steve Schicker travels to South Carolina to hunt with Pete Gutowski of Uslide Bowholder, this time for deer.

programme.title: Elk Fever
programme.desc: This week, we join Gerry Rightmyer as he goes on the elk hunt of a lifetime, finally getting drawn after 16 years.

programme.title: New Brunswick Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: This week the Forever Wild Outdoors cameras are filming in beautiful New Brunswick for black bear with outfitter Ben Savior.

programme.title: Deep in The Skinny
programme.desc: Capt. Nathan Chennaux reunites with old fishing buddy to put the new Towee Skiff to the test. Shallow water redfish beware!

programme.title: Cowboy Like You've Never Seen
programme.desc: Yes sir, Capt. Ed trades his Cuban coffee for some South Texas joe as Capt. Scott Null shows the Florida angler the saltier side of Texas.

programme.title: Meet the Bennettes on their Multi-Species South Dakota Line
programme.desc: Tune in for plenty of excitement as Matt and Nancy Bennette run their trapline. Matt is an old pro, while Nancy is new to the craft. Nancys anticipation and excitement is palpable as she wears her emotions on her sleeve

programme.title: Sweetgrass First Nation - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Shawna as she heads to Saskatchewan to hunt Sweetgrass First Nation with Lance owner of Battle River Cree Outdoors. (Part 1 of 3)

programme.title: PK Lures Walleye Fishing
programme.desc: We do a little bait testing with Curt Reeff, owner of PK lures. First we fish on the Missouri River then we head north to Manitoba, where Bryan Bogdan and Kurt test out some of the same baits and color combinations on Northern Manitoba walleyes

programme.title: The Pipeline: Alberta Kool-Aid Mans COP28
programme.desc: "Derek Fildebrandt, Nigel Hannaford & Cory Morgan discuss; Notleys retirement?; Liberal speaker death watch

programme.title: Sweetgrass First Nation - Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of Shawna's trip to Saskatchewan to hunt Sweetgrass First Nation with Lance owner of Battle River Cree Outdoors. (Part 2 of 3)

programme.title: Hot Seat - Part 1
programme.desc: Dry field, lots of ducks and the best hide you’ll see this year! So much action that we had to split it into two parts. Don’t miss the first half of this epic hunt!"

programme.title: Whitetail Rut in Texas: Feast or Famine - Part 2
programme.desc: The rutting action in South Texas really heats up as Steve of Yamaha Outdoors continues his pursuit of whitetail during the rut

programme.title: Northern Saskatchewan Black Bear
programme.desc: "Calvin takes friends Luke Alberts and Darcy Lodoen on their first black bear hunt in Northern Saskatchewan

programme.desc: It’s hot in Texas, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get in a good axis hunt. It doesn’t get better than walking, stalking and dropping an axis deer.

programme.title: The Clam" Before the Storm"
programme.desc: Capt. Ed Zyak is joined by long time TV host and Banana River native Capt. Blair Wiggins to visit Blair's home waters to find the famed flats unrecognizable. Human impact and runoff have taken their toll, but Capt. Blair and others have a plan.

programme.title: Coastal River Chinook Salmon
programme.desc: Casting spinners and jigs for BC river chinook salmon

programme.title: Pacific Saltwater Bottom Fishing
programme.desc: Jigging spoons for BC coastal halibut and pacific cod

programme.title: Pacific Coho Salmon
programme.desc: Fishing lures and drifting jigs for coastal BC coho salmon

programme.title: Filling the Freezer
programme.desc: After a long 8 weeks the meat birds are finally ready for the freezer. Family and friends band together and join Ben & Nicole as they slaughter whats left of their chickens in hopes of being able to feed both them and Bens parents for the winter

programme.title: Winter Woes
programme.desc: Ben and Nicole have committed to a goal of self-sufficiency. Unfortunately, its proving harder than they thought. Homesteading isnt as glamourous as it may look online. Atlantic Canadian winters are proving more difficult than ever before

programme.title: Spring Cleaning
programme.desc: As winter thaws Ben & Nicole set out to tidy up the yard and prep the garden. With cleanup well underway they pick up a new honeybee hive in hopes of being able to pollinate their garden and reap some sweet, sweet homegrown honey

programme.title: Logan's Bear Blanket
programme.desc: Logan turns this bear into a rug

programme.title: Island Pheasant
programme.desc: Your host Steve Elmy is going to take you on an awesome trip to the most southern inhabited island in Canada for an epic pheasant hunt

programme.title: Sunny Skies Where the Dove Dies
programme.desc: Loaded with Kent shells we hunt a few different locations and share some tips on what to look for when you want to get out and sharpen your skills before the waterfowl season

programme.title: Arkansas Duck Hunting
programme.desc: The crew heads to the duck capital of the world with good friend Russell Roberson from Alpha Innovations

programme.title: The Midwest
programme.desc: his week Heath & Brandon head to the Midwest in pursuit of giant whitetails

programme.title: South Dakota
programme.desc: This week Clede Spooner and Matt Cowell head west in pursuit of two species they've never hunted

programme.title: Texas
programme.desc: Watch as Ted and Amber head to Texas for some prairie dog and hog hunting

programme.title: Nighttime Raccoon
programme.desc: The Green Way Outdoors team heads over to their friends at Jank's Pheasant Farm. They are having serious issues with raccoons killing their pheasants. So the guys do a a night time raccoon hunt in exchange for a little pheasant hunting

programme.title: Early Season Canada Goose
programme.desc: Kyle & Jeff meet up with their buddy Ray Hoody for the early Canada goose season in Michigan

programme.title: South Dakota Pheasant & Jumping Asian Carp
programme.desc: The Green Way Outdoors team head to the pheasant capital of America, South Dakota. They hunt for pheasants and then head to the Missouri River to partake in some aerial Asian carp bowfishing!

programme.title: Operation Elk
programme.desc: September is elk season in the Rockies and the boys are in search of their biggest bulls yet.

programme.title: Crazy Rut Hunting
programme.desc: November, the rut is on, and the Grigsby is home to some of the best whitetail hunting in the Midwest. Strap into your tree stand because you have to put the hours in to shoot a Booner

programme.title: Crazy Rut Hunting
programme.desc: November, the rut is on, and the Grigsby is home to some of the best whitetail hunting in the Midwest. Strap into your tree stand because you have to put the hours in to shoot a Booner

programme.title: Wildfire Devastation
programme.desc: Rich and Sandi talk about the wild fire on the line and show the devastation caused.

programme.title: Wood Day on the Trapline
programme.desc: It's wood day out on the trapline, and Rich and Sandi put some of the newly fire killed trees to good use. Then it’s off to check lynx and otter traps from last winter.

programme.title: The Eastern Cape of South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're on a journey back to South Africa where we'll take a look at a variety of adventures and what goes on behind the scenes on some hunts.

programme.title: Axis Hunting and a Waterbuck Adventure in South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're going to join Jeff Reynolds as he goes on a dream hunt for an axis buck and then we'll journey back to South Africa with Wade Middleton as he goes back into the field in search of a waterbuck.

programme.title: Hog Hunts and a Big Ten Point
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we look at all the ways that you can hunt hogs and then we'll go on a whitetail adventure with Brian Flaherty of TenPoint Crossbows where he's going to encounter his best buck ever.

programme.title: Arctic Char: Tree River Staycation - Part 2
programme.desc: After a good night’s rest in the pouring rain, we head out early up river to the famous Presidential Falls and then back onto the hunt for an Arctic Char in full spawning colors.

programme.title: Lake Trout - Great Slave Lake
programme.desc: We take in the last morning of fishing before the long 300km boat ride home to Yellowknife, NT. The fish are not done yet and we get to show you what not to do, when battling a giant lake trout to the boat!

programme.title: Shore Fishn Northern Pike
programme.desc: Its September and Ryan jumps back into the boat with Captain Andrew Moore and they head out on another personal bucket list adventure for the elusive Inconnu and some giant pike.

programme.title: Fly Fishing the Grand Cascapedia
programme.desc: This week, Pierre and his buddy Pat are in Gaspesie, Quebec for some fly fishing at the legendary Grand Cascapedia River.

programme.title: New Brunswick Moose
programme.desc: This week, while Pierre is in Newfoundland, we go to New Brunswick to hunt some moose with JLR Trophy Bear Hunting

programme.title: Turkey Hunting
programme.desc: Pierre goes to the administrative region of Estrie to meet his fellow guide Samuel L'Heureux who will show him the basics of turkey hunting.

programme.title: Pure Passion Part 2 : Saskatchewan Black Bears
programme.desc: Join Brody and Amy Teale as they hunt and fish along the North Saskatchewan River with Pure Passion Outfitting.

programme.title: Pure Passion Part 1 : Saskatchewan Black Bears
programme.desc: Join Brody and Amy Teale as they hunt and fish along the North Saskatchewan River with Pure Passion Outfitting.

programme.title: Chasin' Whitetails: Manitoba Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Join Troy Esau on an exciting journey as he tracks elusive mature whitetail deer throughout the Manitoba hunting season.

programme.title: Trophy Pintails in Oregon
programme.desc: Mario and the local Oregon guys get together for a late season hunt in the Pacific NW. They pull out the layout boats for some high-water tricks to shoot some trophy Pintails and other ducks.

programme.title: Cold Weather Ducks
programme.desc: Mario heads east to a few different states and ends up in Wyoming at the Weatherby Facility for a tour. To cap things off we get to head out on the river for a very cold and snowy mallard hunt, with a small side of honkers to enjoy.

programme.title: Wild West Ducks & Nebraska Snows
programme.desc: The FA crew heads out on the famed Columbia River in Oregon to chase some birds, miles of places for the birds to hide and some incredible scenery. Then we slide into a little trip we took to Nebraska to hunt with the guys at Whiskey Sloughs.

programme.title: Mom's Bear
programme.desc: Corey and his parents go bear hunting in the North Woods. It's moms first time chasing black bear.

programme.title: Kettle Falls Walleye
programme.desc: Bob Loomis and Britton Ransford join Rich Harrod on a walleye fishing adventure to the upper reach of Lake Roosevelt. The fish are numerous and the bite is on in this beautiful part of the Columbia River

programme.title: Passing on a Hunting Traditon
programme.desc: The Martin fathers are teaching their daughters and sons to hunt elk in the juniper country of eastern Oregon. Horses helped the family get to the high ground where elusive bulls could be found, but the ride doesn’t guarantee success

programme.title: Gobble Gobble
programme.desc: This week on Hit Squad Outdoors, it's all about the turkeys

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Join five time UFC Champ, Tim Sylvia, in the outdoors hunting and fishing

programme.title: Dangerous Gator
programme.desc: Blaine is in a small dingy and things get a little crazy when a gator tries to get him inside the small boat

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: Producer Eric Orton travels remote logging roads to witness extreme hatchery operations with Steve Lacasse, Debbie Anderson, and husband Grant Anderson on Northern Vancouver Island

programme.title: The Icebox
programme.desc: Northern Manitoba holds some of the biggest lake trout on the planet. Guides from Bakers Narrows Lodge explain the benefits of catch and release while battling extreme weather warnings on their way to becoming Master Anglers

programme.title: The Gateway
programme.desc: The Gateway is fed by ancient glacier rivers with an abundance of sockeye salmon and the predators that feed on them. Eric Orton talks about his time off-shore fishing Port Hardy

programme.title: It’s Like Candy for Pike
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. When the bite slows, how do you entice the giants? Check out this finesse presentation that always works time and time again on the inactive brutes

programme.title: A Trick or Two for Bass
programme.desc: Today’s destination takes Charlie up to the Land O’ Lakes area of Eastern Ontario for smallmouth bass. Charlie joins up with friend Chris McMillan as the two enjoy a day of bass fishing. The two share techniques for clear water lakes

programme.title: Hooked on Lake Trout and Untouched Walleye
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. Check out Charlie’s tip on modifying your tackle for large lake trout. Then, off for an often ignored walleye bite that will have you wanting more

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 1
programme.desc: Watch this week as Ted, Amber and country music singer Heath Sanders go to hunt mule deer in Texas

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 2
programme.desc: Ted and country music singer, Heath Sanders chase mule deer and then it’s off to do some airgun hunting on some Texas deer!

programme.title: Revelstoke ATV Adventure
programme.desc: The boys take to the trails in Revelstoke, BC with members of the Revelstoke ATV Club

programme.title: White Lake BC Trout
programme.desc: Back to BC, on the beautiful waters of White Lake looking for trophy rainbows

programme.title: Kokanee Springs Escape
programme.desc: Jason tees off as Blair runs the cart and the boys explore Crawford Bay, BC and Kokanee Springs Resort

programme.title: YouTube Hog Hunt Special
programme.desc: Today we're doing something a little different, we're giving you a little history on our YouTube channel and showing some of our favorite posts. Then, we’ll show three of our best hog hunts that have never aired anywhere but YouTube

programme.title: Swamp Hogs & Mickey Gilley Dedication
programme.desc: We join Keith on a thermal hog hunt, later he introduces us to his friend Shannon Tracy from UVC Powersports as both Shannon and Keith talk about the life and career of country music legend, Mickey Gilley

programme.title: Thermal Rampage
programme.desc: Keith Warren and his daughter meet up with Team Swamp Stomp for a Texas hog hunt in the dead of night using some killer Pulsar thermal scopes! Joining them is Garrett Streitz of APF, who decks out the team with some top-notch .308 Caliber AR-10s for the carnage!

programme.title: Dacre Part II & Mud Fest
programme.desc: Find out how the team finished at the Dacre and then they head to Mirimachi Mud Fest 2023

programme.title: Nackawic & Crabbe Mountain Inn
programme.desc: The town of Nackawic is an exceptional ATV Hero as they allow the crossing of the St. John River to connect the southern and northern parts of New Brunswick. Many towns could learn from the welcoming nature of this town. We then head to an ATV friendly Inn to further explore the area

programme.title: Adventure Day
programme.desc: The Trekkit Crew takes a bunch of first time ATV riders out on brand new Segway ATVs and SxS and have them experience riding the trails. The trip ranges from getting stuck in the mud, rock climbs, and scenic trails

programme.title: Fur Buying Event
programme.desc: Join Kent Maitland and fellow trappers as he inspects, grades and purchases, shed antlers and prime pelts

programme.title: Punching Trails
programme.desc: Join Scott and some good friends as they help punch trails in deep snow

programme.title: Cold November Set Up
programme.desc: Scott heads down to Valley Firearms to buy a compact dispatch rifle for the snowmobile. Then he hangs a lynx set and sets up the line on a cold November start to the season

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E38 | Mike Check

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E39 | The One That Got Away
programme.desc: From Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida, Vanessa Rousso makes her first appearance on Poker Night along with some regulars to the show. Featuring Phil Laak, Vanessa Rousso, Matt Affleck, Jared Jaffee, Noah Schwartz, Alan Richardson, Glynn Beebe

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E40 | Straight Shooter
programme.desc: Phil Laak puts his chips in with "delicate, consistent, well-appointed strength" from Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Mukul Pahuja, Matt Salsberg, Matt Affleck, Phil Laak, Dan Shak, Esther Taylor, Asher Conniff

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E41 | Ladies Night III
programme.desc: Back by popular demand, we invited just the ladies to Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida, for a night of poker with considerably less body hair around the table. programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E42 | Ace Race
programme.desc: Ladies Night III continues from Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E01 | Face Up With Jennifer Tilly
programme.desc: We showcase cash game action from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Plus, we do our first in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Jennifer Tilly, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Maria Ho, Jason Andrews, Griffin Abel, Dave Eldrige

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E02 | Any Two Cards
programme.desc: Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA hosts our cash game while our invited pros start to play a little loose. Also, we show Part 2 of our in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Matt Brady, Alec Torelli, Jennifer Tilly, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Daniel Wolf, Dave Eldridge, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jason Andrews

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E03 | The Rivers of Pittsburgh

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E04 | The Wizard
programme.desc: Misty morning, clouds in the sky, without warning, the wizard walks by our cash game at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Claude Petroy, Alec Torelli, Keith Morrow, Jennifer Tilly, Daniel Wolf, Stepan Gusak, Griffin Abel, Patsy Altomari, Matt Glantz

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E05 | Where There's Smoke...
programme.desc: We visit the poker room at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA, and rub elbows with some of the East Coast's most notable players. Featuring Greg Fishberg, Todd Brunson, Matt Glantz, Linda Kenney Baden, Mark Herm, Joe McKeehen, and Gajan Jeganathan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E06 | Face Up With Shaun Deeb
programme.desc: We continue the poker party at SugarHouse Casino, with east coast grinders battling hand for hand in Philadelphia. programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E07 | Pay The Troll Toll
programme.desc: Our second day of filming at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA begins with some big hands and small needles. Featuring Matt Glantz, Todd Brunson, Jo Kim, Mike Sigel, Greg Himmelbrand, Shaun Deeb, Tony Reed, and Thai Ha

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E08 | Sugar And Spice
programme.desc: The poker spices up as the night winds down at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA. Featuring Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Akim Akimov, Mike Sigel, Matt Brady, Shaun Deeb, and Thai Ha

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E09 | Face Up With E-Tay

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E10 | Charitable Donations

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E11 | Cranberries

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E12 | Woe Is Stapes
programme.desc: Our exclusive cash game continues from Seminole Hard Rock from Hollywood, FL, with some tough cards hitting the community, but it seems to hit Joe Stapleton hardest of all. Featuring Tom Marchese, Jessica Dawley, Matt Berkey, Jennifer Tilly, Dan O'Brien, Aaron Mermelstein, and Dan Suied

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E13 | The Man With The Biggest Stack
programme.desc: Brad Garrett joins our table at Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, FL. Can he hold his own against the pros? He's certainly got a big enough chip stack! Featuring Brad Garrett, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, Brandon Adams, Ryan Fee, and Eric Wasserson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E14 | You Are A Mother #%$@&r!
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly goes full Jennifer TILTy as we conclude our filming at Seminole Hard Rock at Hollywood, FL. Featuring Eric Wasserson, Esther Taylor, Ryan Fee, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, and Michael Laake

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E15 | Winterhalter Is Coming
programme.desc: We corral seven of California's poker elite at our cash game table hosted by Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Lee Markholt, Kelly Winterhalter, David Sands, Phil Hellmuth, Harlan Karnofsky, Rep Porter, Keith McNair, and Bob Mather

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E16 | Quick Sands
programme.desc: Our cash game continues from the beautiful Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Lee Markholt, Kelly Winterhalter, David Sands, Phil Hellmuth, Jerry Utke, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Keith McNair, and Bob Mather

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E17 | Top Golf
programme.desc: We begin our second day of filming cash game action at Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA, plus our players take a visit to a Top Golf facility to show off their driving chops. Featuring Matt Glantz, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Brad Garrett, Tony Bracy, Phil Hellmuth, and Harlan Karnofsky

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E18 | Way Down In The Valley
programme.desc: We conclude our epic cash game from Thunder Valley Casino in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Brad Garrett, Phil Hellmuth, Lee Markholt, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Tony Bracy, Rep Porter, and Jed Hoffman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E19 | P.O.W.
programme.desc: Phil Laak invents new poker terms during our first visit to Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Greg Merson, Phil Hellmuth, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E20 | Heckmuth
programme.desc: We get some epic Hellmuth rants in this episode from Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Phil Hellmuth, Brandon Cantu, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E21 | Pass The Eight Ball
programme.desc: The outlook is good for our players as we begin our second day of filming at The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas Nevada. Featuring Jim Carroll, Craig Casino, Stan Jablonksi, Jared Jaffee, Mario Orozco, Richard Roeper, and Brandon Cantu

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E22 | Not Live From Las Vegas
programme.desc: We close out the second day of our series from The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada with the best hands from the night. Featuring Jim Carroll, Craig Casino, Stan Jablonksi, Jared Jaffee, Mario Orozco, Richard Roeper, Matt Glantz, Mike Dentale, and Brandon Cantu

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E23 | Maybe I Just Hit Quads
programme.desc: We shake up the cast at our table as we begin our third day of filming from The Golden Nugget in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E24 | Panning For Gold
programme.desc: Our players try and sift for those last few nuggets as the night winds down on our visit to The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E25 | Poker Night In Canada!
programme.desc: We team up with our friends at partypoker to make our first trip to Canada! Playground Poker Club in Montreal is host to our high-stakes cash game, played by luminaries from the US, Canada, and the UK. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E26 | A Playground For Poker
programme.desc: The pros at partypoker sling chips at nose-bleed stakes with their friends at Playground Poker Club in Montreal. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E27 | Mauvais Coup
programme.desc: There are some wicked turn outs for the partypoker pros as the poker at Playground Poker Club in Montreal winds down on the first day of our visit. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E28 | partypoker Poker Party
programme.desc: We begin our second day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, and the pros from partypoker face off against some of the best players in North America. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E29 | Montreal Nights
programme.desc: Our second day of filming at Playground Poker Club draws to a close as the pros from partypoker try to draw to a straight. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Films - The Craig Jones Story
programme.desc:
A short documentary telling the story of Craig Jones' sudden rise to success after his upset victory over Leandro Lo at ADCC 2017. After his breakout performance at ADCC, Craig went on to beat many more big names such as Jake Shields In Polaris, and made it to the finals of EBI, where he had a close finals match against Gordon Ryan. Since then Craig has competed in some of the biggest tournaments in the world and his life has changed dramatically. In this film we see that it wasn't always an easy road for him.
Director Stuart Cooper

programme.title: Superfight - Andre Galvao vs Braulio Estima by Stuart Cooper
programme.desc: In this video Andre Galvao looks back on his match with Braulio Estima for the ADCC 2013 Super Fight Title. Then, Andre recaps on some of his most entertaining matches from ADCC 2011, which include; Don Ortega, Gunnar Nelson, Pablo Popovitch, Rousimar "Toquinho" Palhares and Sergio Moraes.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 2: Tučepi, Baška Voda, Split, Supetar, Bol
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of 2017, we travel to the paradise beach of Pak Nam Pran, in southern Thailand for the first kite racing event of the year – the Asian Twin Tip Racing Championships. We also head south-east from Thailand to Indonesia, a country blessed with some of the best waves on the planet – and we meet up with pro kite wave surfers: Keahi de Aboitiz, Moona Whyte and Matt Elsasser. We visit another great place for kiting, Zanzibar, the pearl of the Indian Ocean, located east of Tanzania and from Zanzibar to Chile, to the big rocks of this incredibly wild coastline and consistently powerful waves. Finally, we move to Korea where the world’s top pro-riders faced off at the first round of the 2017 IKA Kitefoil Gold Cup.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we fly to Europe and descend on Italy’s notorious Gizzeria kiteboarding spot, where the riders really like to be Uncool – in a statement of “reverse kudos”. Thanks to its reputation for excellent kiteboarding conditions and a relaxing ambience, Hangloose Beach annually hosts some of the world's top events. We catch up with the 2017 IKA TwinTip Racing Slalom European Championship where the titles are closely fought among a line-up of almost 120 riders from 21 different countries. In addition, multiple Champion Oliver Bridge is going to introduce us to the basics of kite control.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: Throughout the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast design foiling catamarans. The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. Let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 1 Daytona Beach, FL
programme.desc: Daytona Beach in Florida is the scenery for this episode of speed and excitement. The crowd gathers in the coast to see a pure show of adrenaline in this extreme sport that is attracting everyday new fans who travel the world to see competitions. Become part of the lineup and get ready to get splashed in the latest edition of the P1 USA AquaX Championship.

programme.title: Second Life In Scandinavia
programme.desc: Hello from Sweden!We are on our way to the island of Orust. This island lives from boatbuilding, and big companies produce sailing boats here to expand their boats to the entire world. When the economic crisis stroke, demand decreased, thus less boats were ordered. This forced habitants of the small island of Orust to find a new path.Refit has become the new trend in Second Life in Scandinavia. Giving a new life to beautiful yachts, not only the economy is changing, but the local community as well. Lucia will venture into the island of Orust to learn more about the way its population has adapted and how it has become the mecca of boatbuilding.Watch out now, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: This sixth edition of the Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship is ready for the action. Joe Morley is about to run a perfect execution to dethrown the 3 times world champion Sam Sutton. Will we see more surprises during the event? programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: RKJ Sailing Legend
programme.desc: Born in Putney, London, Sir William Robert Patrick Knox-Johnston served in the Merchant Navy, where he acquired his skills to later on become a British legend and be awarded the title of Sir.RKJ Sailing Legend is a 56-minute documentary about possibly the most famous sailor in modern times, Sir Robin Knox-Johnston. RKJ was the first man to sail non-stop and alone around the world back in 1969: Now on the 50th anniversary of his achievement, we want to rememorate his feat.Get on board RKJ Sailing Legend, the remarkable story of Knox-Johnston's voyage around the world and into history. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of 2017, we travel to the paradise beach of Pak Nam Pran, in southern Thailand for the first kite racing event of the year – the Asian Twin Tip Racing Championships. We also head south-east from Thailand to Indonesia, a country blessed with some of the best waves on the planet – and we meet up with pro kite wave surfers: Keahi de Aboitiz, Moona Whyte and Matt Elsasser. We visit another great place for kiting, Zanzibar, the pearl of the Indian Ocean, located east of Tanzania and from Zanzibar to Chile, to the big rocks of this incredibly wild coastline and consistently powerful waves. Finally, we move to Korea where the world’s top pro-riders faced off at the first round of the 2017 IKA Kitefoil Gold Cup.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we fly to Europe and descend on Italy’s notorious Gizzeria kiteboarding spot, where the riders really like to be Uncool – in a statement of “reverse kudos”. Thanks to its reputation for excellent kiteboarding conditions and a relaxing ambience, Hangloose Beach annually hosts some of the world's top events. We catch up with the 2017 IKA TwinTip Racing Slalom European Championship where the titles are closely fought among a line-up of almost 120 riders from 21 different countries. In addition, multiple Champion Oliver Bridge is going to introduce us to the basics of kite control.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: Right after Weifang, some of the world's top riders flew to Pingtan for the 2017 IKA TwinTip World Championship, together with 2017 KiteFoil GoldCup - ACT3... and so did Kite Masters. Pingtan is the place where it all started for Kiteboarding in China. The first Kiteboarding School was established in Pingtan's sandy beach, helping develop the sport in every way. Since then, thousands of new riders have joined this exciting sport in China.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Poseidon Games
programme.desc: The Poseidon Games is a global sporting tour that included a variety of water sports using hydro-flight in 2018. The global circuit started in April 2018 in Australia and travelled to 3 other destinations including Singapore, New York & Bermuda.Gold Coast, Australia and the InterContinental Sanctuary Cove Resort hosted the first edition of the 2018 Poseidon Games. With the collaboration efforts from Savvy Entertainment and Jet Pack Events, fans of the hydro flight community witnessed two days of exciting performances as the industry took a huge leap in technical progression.Starting in Australia and making its way to Bermuda and then New York, it concludes in a huge event in Singapore. Watch this international tour aimed at lovers of hydro flight, a new water sport that is still unknown for many but is gaining more fans all over the world by the minute.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep7- Great Family Adventure - Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman & Emily Jackson and family tour the attractions and adventures of Ocean City, Maryland.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep8 - Kayaking the Tennessee River Line
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the creeks, rivers and lakes of the mighty Tennessee River Line.

programme.desc: The AquaX competition continues its Round 2 on Cocoa Beach, Florida. Jet skies rush into the water at vertiginous speeds in the latest competition of the Championship. So far, challengers have only tested the water once, but they know the level is high and they will have to give their all in this competition in order to win. Find out what happens at Cocoa Beach.

programme.title: PRADA America's Cup World Series and Christmas Regatta
programme.desc: The America’s Cup is the oldest trophy in international sport. A competition that remounts to 1851 when an American schooner won a race around the Isle of Wight. Now, it is the pinnacle of yachting: top performance boats and a crew that has to be part machine and part scientist if they want to stand a chance at one of the toughest competitions.To determine who will face the defender of the America’s Cup the other teams that seek victory fight the Prada Cup. They have made the latest version of the trophy, special for this occasion. Created by the renowned designer Marc Newson and handcrafted by Florentine silversmiths, only one team will take back home this trophy.Become part of the crew formed by superheroes as they fight to get the advantage and be the fastest in the water. In this race split seconds determine victory, and a single mistake could mean going back home empty-handed. Watch the highlights and best moments of the PRADA America’s Cup World Series and the Christmas Regatta, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Poznan
programme.desc: Welcome to Poznan in Poland. We are at Lake Malta for the first ICF Canoe Sprint World Cup of 2019. For athletes, a hard winter's training has come to an end and they are ready to test themselves on the world stage to lay down a marker ahead of this season's big focus: the World Championships in Hungary. They are getting ready to race for their country at the 2020 Olympic Games in Tokyo. Who will be making an impact in this first event? Discover the best moments of the 2019 Canoe Sprint World Cup in Poland.

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship - Episode 1
programme.desc: 175 of the world's best kayakers are gathering for the 10th anniversary edition of the Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship. They are committed to find the ideal or "sickest" line on this challenging competition. Racing up the creek, they are fighting for the world championship. Watch the best moments of the 2017 Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: RKJ Sailing Legend
programme.desc: Born in Putney, London, Sir William Robert Patrick Knox-Johnston served in the Merchant Navy, where he acquired his skills to later on become a British legend and be awarded the title of Sir.RKJ Sailing Legend is a 56-minute documentary about possibly the most famous sailor in modern times, Sir Robin Knox-Johnston. RKJ was the first man to sail non-stop and alone around the world back in 1969: Now on the 50th anniversary of his achievement, we want to rememorate his feat.Get on board RKJ Sailing Legend, the remarkable story of Knox-Johnston's voyage around the world and into history. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: Right after Weifang, some of the world's top riders flew to Pingtan for the 2017 IKA TwinTip World Championship, together with 2017 KiteFoil GoldCup - ACT3... and so did Kite Masters. Pingtan is the place where it all started for Kiteboarding in China. The first Kiteboarding School was established in Pingtan's sandy beach, helping develop the sport in every way. Since then, thousands of new riders have joined this exciting sport in China.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 2 Cocoa Beach, FL
programme.desc: The AquaX competition continues its Round 2 on Cocoa Beach, Florida. Jet skies rush into the water at vertiginous speeds in the latest competition of the Championship. So far, challengers have only tested the water once, but they know the level is high and they will have to give their all in this competition in order to win. Find out what happens at Cocoa Beach.

programme.title: Rolex New York Yacht Invitational Cup - Highlight
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: MAR
programme.desc: Surfing has ceased a long time ago to be considered a niche sport. As the mainstream industry discovers its potential for selling clothes, trips and a whole set of ‘lifestyle’ products, there are those who appreciate it for what it is in its purest form – a direct connection to mother nature.We accompany Big Wave surfer Alex Botelho and some of his friends to meet surfers who balance their love for the ocean and nature with a professional career in the sport. Mar is a tale of discovery, triumph and (almost) tragedy, but above all it is a life affirming pledge to positive vibes in and out of the line-up.Get ready to soak up a new conception of the world of surf as Alex Botelho unveils concepts unknown for the mainstream audience, available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Best Feature Documentary – Best Istanbul Film Festival 2021. Official Selections 2021: Ocean Film Festival World Tour, International Ocean Film Festival.

programme.title: A Date with the Strait
programme.desc: The Bass Strait is a strip of water that divides the Australian mainland from Tasmania. Knowing that wild storms make the strait twice as rough as the English Channel, sailors stand in awe of the strong currents.In a death-defying act, two Aussies and a young Californian kneeling on their boards brave the 300 km/186.5mi paddle across the Bass Strait. Their adventure lasts several days with stops on small islands along the way. Apart from sharks, currents and threatening waves, win-or-bust Zeb Walsh, Brad Gaul and Jack Bark face sickness, sore muscles and dehydration. Follow their journey on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Semaine De Saint Barthelemy - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Boasting world class competition and legendary parties, the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta reigns as the undisputed king of Caribbean sailing. Given the lineup of over 200 internationally acclaimed boats skippered by the sailing world's top athletes, the stakes are high and anything can happen.Sail with us across the highlights of the 34th edition of the Heineken Regatta!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: First stop for this episode is the exotic destination and kiteboarding playground of Mauritius, for one of the most high-profile and biggest kite-foiling events: the Hydrofoil Pro Tour. From one island to another, we leave the exotic racetracks of Mauritius and head to Cagliari on Sardinia for another exciting gathering of the world's best kitefoiling riders. The World Championship also marked the close of the 2017 Kitefoil Gold Cup World Series.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode, we move to Dongshan, China for the 2017 Dongshan China International Kiteboarding Open. Combining culture with heritage, this small island, located along the Taiwan Strait, hosts a population of 200,000. The Youth Olympic Games is a hot topic in the Kiteboarding community, eagerly anticipated by riders and supporters. Reflecting an exciting and new race format, the slalom/boarder-cross is designed to challenge the riders' ability to stay in control, while maintaining maximum speed.

programme.title: The Ocean Race - Leg 7 Genova - HL
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Zurich Wakeboard
programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: Rolex New York Yacht Invitational Cup - Highlight
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: A Date with the Strait
programme.desc: The Bass Strait is a strip of water that divides the Australian mainland from Tasmania. Knowing that wild storms make the strait twice as rough as the English Channel, sailors stand in awe of the strong currents.In a death-defying act, two Aussies and a young Californian kneeling on their boards brave the 300 km/186.5mi paddle across the Bass Strait. Their adventure lasts several days with stops on small islands along the way. Apart from sharks, currents and threatening waves, win-or-bust Zeb Walsh, Brad Gaul and Jack Bark face sickness, sore muscles and dehydration. Follow their journey on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 1
programme.desc: We set out to sail under the hot July sun and brilliant blue skies of Viareggio, a Tuscan port town best known for its long-standing tradition of shipbulding. The journey on board the Ghibellina will take us along the coast of central Italy, guiding us through the various sea passages of the area. Sit down, relax and get on board the Ghibellina with us!

programme.title: The Voyage Of Ghibellina - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we will visit the Sicilian archipelago: the Aeolian islands. We dive into its beautiful landsdcape, villages of small white buildings and lush vegetation. These seven small islands are home to two active volcanos, Vulcano and Stromboli, and the reefs testify the many geological upheavals they have suffered. Enjoy the breathtaking sunrise as we leave the island of Stromboli.

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: First stop for this episode is the exotic destination and kiteboarding playground of Mauritius, for one of the most high-profile and biggest kite-foiling events: the Hydrofoil Pro Tour. From one island to another, we leave the exotic racetracks of Mauritius and head to Cagliari on Sardinia for another exciting gathering of the world's best kitefoiling riders. The World Championship also marked the close of the 2017 Kitefoil Gold Cup World Series.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode, we move to Dongshan, China for the 2017 Dongshan China International Kiteboarding Open. Combining culture with heritage, this small island, located along the Taiwan Strait, hosts a population of 200,000. The Youth Olympic Games is a hot topic in the Kiteboarding community, eagerly anticipated by riders and supporters. Reflecting an exciting and new race format, the slalom/boarder-cross is designed to challenge the riders' ability to stay in control, while maintaining maximum speed.
